title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Neuland Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Neuland Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Neuland Laboratories in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Neuland Laboratories:
Neuland Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Neuland Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
